name: AI Agent Wallet
one_liner: Wallet infrastructure for AI agents with spending limits, programmatic guardrails, and audit trails

name: On-Chain Reputation Graph
one_liner: Composable reputation system where actions across dApps build a unified trust score

name: Decentralized Compute Marketplace
one_liner: Marketplace for GPU/CPU compute where providers stake collateral for SLA guarantees

name: Crypto-Native Publishing
one_liner: Publishing platform where readers directly fund writers via micropayments and subscriptions

name: Verifiable AI Inference
one_liner: Prove that an AI model produced a specific output without revealing the model weights

name: Autonomous World
one_liner: Fully on-chain game world where state persists and evolves even without players

name: Token-Gated Commerce
one_liner: E-commerce where token holders get exclusive access, discounts, or products

name: Decentralized Science (DeSci)
one_liner: Fund, conduct, and publish scientific research with on-chain coordination

name: Music NFT Platform
one_liner: Musicians release songs as NFTs, fans earn from streaming royalties

name: LLM Token Exchange
one_liner: Buy, sell, and redeem inference credits for any AI model in one marketplace

name: Decentralized Wireless
one_liner: Community-owned cellular/WiFi networks incentivized by token rewards

name: On-Chain Governance Framework
one_liner: Modular governance primitives: voting, delegation, timelock, veto, quorum

name: Privacy-Preserving DeFi
one_liner: DeFi protocols with private balances and transaction amounts using ZK proofs

name: Tokenized Carbon Credits
one_liner: Bring carbon credits on-chain for transparent retirement and trading

name: Crypto-Native HR Platform
one_liner: Hiring, onboarding, payroll, and equity management for crypto-native teams

name: Conditional Prediction Markets
one_liner: Markets for conditional outcomes — if X happens, what's the probability of Y?

name: Cross-Chain Intent Protocol
one_liner: Express what you want (swap, bridge, stake) and solvers compete to fill it optimally

name: Decentralized Map
one_liner: Community-contributed mapping data owned by contributors, not corporations

name: On-Chain Derivatives Clearing
one_liner: Clearinghouse for structured products with automated margin and settlement

name: AI-Powered Smart Contract Auditor
one_liner: AI tool that finds vulnerabilities in Move code before deployment
